reviews.review_description: Ty rony gtag  for telling me this game u made

developer_response.body: Halol! thank you for playing tech tree, and thank you for the generous 5 star review. we appreaciate your review and hope to see you on the next update. btw there is a hidden bossfight, not sure if you found it.

reviews.review_title: Fun but I can't finish the levels
reviews.review_description: This game is very fun and I recomend it but I can't make some of the jump (Might just be me) the challange on 2 is hard and some jumps are impossible. Devs if you are seeing this please fix.

developer_response.body: Hello There. I Appreciate The 5 Stars. The Challenge Is Possible If You Have Unlocked All Ingame Tech, If you havent some objects wont appear making the level impossible. the challenge is meant to be hard. if you dont know how to obtain techs here is an explanation : at the end of each level there is a collectible remote, collect it and you will get the tech. thank you for your review and bye
